description: When signal_kind is known, take only reversal setups.
Exit at first mark after 180s if still open.
When signal_kind is known, take only continuation setups.
Exit at first mark after 90s if still open.
At 10s, if MFE < 0.5 and still below entry, exit.
Skip entries triggered later than 40s into the source candle.
Skip entries triggered later than 30s into the source candle.
Exit on -2 points adverse move within 5s.
Exit on -5 points adverse move within 15s.
Exit on -3 points adverse move within 10s.
